query:
INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, sortOrder, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT e.id, cat.name, cat.sortOrder, 1, NOW(), NOW()
FROM establishments e
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Hambúrgueres Clássicos' as name, 1 as sortOrder UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Hambúrgueres Gourmet', 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Hambúrgueres Artesanais', 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Combos', 4 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Porções', 5 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Bebidas', 6 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Sobremesas', 7 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Kids', 8 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Vegetarianos', 9
) cat
WHERE e.userId = 180577;
